heading: Restrictions on use of payments
label: 300d–15 Restrictions on use of payments
notes: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to restrictions on use of payments.Pub. L. 110–23
amendments: Amendments2007— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to restrictions on use of payments.Pub. L. 110–23

children.text: for any purpose other than developing, implementing, and monitoring the modifications required by to be made to the State plan for the provision of emergency medical services;section 300d–11(b) of this title
to make cash payments to intended recipients of services provided pursuant to this section;
to purchase or improve real property (other than minor remodeling of existing improvements to real property);
to satisfy any requirement for the expenditure of non-Federal funds as a condition for the receipt of Federal funds; or
to provide financial assistance to any entity other than a public or nonprofit private entity.

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: b Waiver
children.text: The Secretary may waive a restriction under subsection (a) only if the Secretary determines that the activities outlined by the State plan submitted under by the State involved cannot otherwise be carried out.section 300d–14(a) of this title
